title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud Tech announced a 5-day AI Agents intensive course in partnership with Kaggle, teaching vibe coding workflows where natural language serves as the programming language for autonomous agents. The course covers agent integrations with external APIs, code execution, agent-to-agent communication, and a capstone project called Kaggriculture for deploying agents in a farming simulation competition.
